query:
SELECT id, name, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Jet2%' OR name LIKE '%jet2%' OR name LIKE '%JET2%';
SELECT id, name, isActive, updatedAt FROM suppliers WHERE updatedAt > '2026-05-09 12:00:00' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT id, name, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Jet2%' OR name LIKE '%jet2%' OR name LIKE '%JET2%';
SELECT id, name, isActive, updatedAt FROM suppliers WHERE updatedAt > '2026-05-09 12:00:00' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 20;
